boundaries: Research-only static analysis. Not investment advice. This tool does not fetch live data, connect to brokers, place orders, recommend buys, sells, holds, target allocations, or trades, predict returns, or produce personalized financial advice.

checks.action: Confirm the evaluator understands this is static research tooling, not investment advice.
checks.name: read_boundaries

checks.action: Review command inputs, outputs, and safety posture before running generators.
checks.name: inspect_command_matrix

checks.action: Use local hashes and fixture records as the starting evidence set.
checks.name: review_evidence_bundle

checks.action: Treat readiness blockers as stop conditions before sharing artifacts.
checks.name: confirm_public_readiness

checks.action: Verify no live data, workflows, private references, broker actions, or advice are in scope.
checks.name: confirm_boundary_attestation

stop_conditions: public-scan reports private or credential-shaped text
requested output requires live data, broker access, trading instructions, or personalized financial advice
title: Evaluator Onboarding Checklist
